subprograms.name: Check
subprograms.code: procedure Check (File : in Ada.Text_IO.File_Type; Item : in String)

documentation.description:
Skip leading whitespace. Trim leading and trailing whitespace
from item; read resulting length characters from File; if they
don't equal trimmed Item, raise Syntax_Error with an "Expecting
..., found ..." message. Otherwise, skip trailing whitespace.

Ada.Text_IO.Get (String) is used, so there may be end of lines
embedded in String.

Skip leading whitespace. Trim leading and trailing whitespace
from item; read resulting length characters from File; if they
don't equal trimmed Item, raise Syntax_Error with an "Expecting
..., found ..." message. Otherwise, skip trailing whitespace.

Ada.Text_IO.Get (String) is used, so there may be end of lines
embedded in String.

subprograms.name: Peek
subprograms.code: function Peek (File : in Ada.Text_IO.File_Type) return Character

documentation.description: Skip leading whitespace, return next character without consuming it.

subprograms.name: Skip_Past
subprograms.code: procedure Skip_Past (File : in Ada.Text_IO.File_Type; Delimiter : in Character)

documentation.description: Skip past next Delimiter in File.
Skip past next Delimiter in File.
Skip space, tab, and end of line in File.
Skip space, tab, and end of line in File.
